auth_notes: Requires a Google Cloud Console project with the 'My Business Business Information API' and 'My Business Account Management API' enabled. Users must configure OAuth2 credentials and handle specific scopes such as 'https://www.googleapis.com/auth/business.manage'.
rate_limits: Standard Google API quotas apply; generally 10,000 requests per day per project, but specific write operations may be more restrictive.
gotchas: The API is fragmented across multiple sub-APIs (Reviews, Verifications, Business Information), requiring multiple API enablements in Google Cloud.
Real-time webhooks require integration with Google Cloud Pub/Sub, adding significant architectural overhead.
Accessing production data often requires a project audit or verification by Google if the app is made public.
client_must_provide: Google Business Profile Account ID and Location ID
operations_available: List and reply to customer reviews
Update business hours and special hours
Retrieve location insights and performance metrics
research_notes: Implementation requires the n8n HTTP Request node using OAuth2 authentication. You must manually define the Authorization URL (https://accounts.google.com/o/oauth2/v2/auth) and Access Token URL (https://oauth2.googleapis.com/token). Because the API uses a nested resource structure (accounts/{accountId}/locations/{locationId}), dynamic URL construction in n8n is necessary.

effort_recommendation.rationale: Implementation requires the n8n HTTP Request node using OAuth2 authentication. You must manually define the Authorization URL (https://accounts.google.com/o/oauth2/v2/auth) and Access Token URL (https://oauth2.googleapis.com/token). Because the API uses a nested resource structure (accounts/{accountId}/locations/{locationId}), dynamic URL construction in n8n is necessary.
